headline: Stanley Black & Decker Supports National Mall Restoration for America's 250th Anniversary with DEWALT® Tool Donations and Funding
summary: Stanley Black & Decker (NYSE: SWK), a global leader in tools and outdoor solutions, announced today a $300,000 contribution to the Trust for the National Mall to support the preservation and care of the National Mall and Memorial Parks in Washington, D.C., by the National Park Service (NPS).

content.title: Stanley Black & Decker Supports National Mall Restoration for America's 250th Anniversary with DEWALT® Tool Donations and Funding
content.summary: Stanley Black & Decker (NYSE: SWK), a global leader in tools and outdoor solutions, announced today a $300,000 contribution to the Trust for the National Mall to support the preservation and care of the National Mall and Memorial Parks in Washington, D.C., by the National Park Service (NPS).

thumbnail.caption: Stanley Black & Decker’s contribution to the Trust for the National Mall for America’s 250th Anniversary reflects its ongoing commitment to strengthening communities and supporting the preservation of public spaces through meaningful partnerships and resources.
